name: FeedoZone
tagline: Hyperlocal food delivery for rural & semi-urban India
mission: To make food delivery accessible and reliable for everyone in India — not just metro cities.
vision: A future where every student, working professional, and family in rural India can order fresh food with a single tap.
currentGoals: Expand to 5 new college towns by end of 2026
Launch Android & iOS apps on app stores
